rulings.Case Title: GENE ESCALERA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Pltfs' Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Domco Products¿ motion to compel plaintiffs¿ further discovery response is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing Re: Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of George Mcdermand By Videotaped Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Joanne McDermand¿s petition to perpetuate testimony of George McDermand by videotaped deposition is denied without prejudice to refiling her request to take the deposition of Mr. McDermand if she fully complies with C.C.P. § 2035.030(b)(9). The request is denied because it does not specify what information Mr. McDermand is expected to testify about as to each prospective defendant and, in particular, why, as to any particular prospective defendant as to whom Mr.McDermand is expected to provide testimony different from the testimony he previously provided in his own lawsuit, why Mr. McDermand is expected to provide different testimony than he gave in his own lawsuit. = (220/HEK)
